data.title: Create eval for brainstorm skill (complex multi-step workflow)
data.description:
Create a promptfoo eval for the brainstorm skill demonstrating intermediate-step verification for a complex, multi-step workflow.

## Implementation
- File: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- Provider: anthropic:messages:claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (cheapest viable)
- Grader: defaultTest.options.provider set to Haiku
- Test cases (at least 2):
  1. Given a feature idea prompt, assert the skill enters Socratic dialogue phase (asks clarifying questions before jumping to implementation)
  2. Given a well-defined feature prompt, assert the skill produces an epic spec with measurable success criteria

### Assertion Strategy
Use llm-rubric assertions that verify intermediate-step quality:
- Does the skill ask clarifying questions before committing to a design? (Socratic dialogue verification)
- Does the output contain structured epic specification fields? (completeness check)

## Test Exemption
test-exempt: declarative YAML config with no conditional logic. Behavioral verification is performed BY promptfoo during eval execution, not by project tests. (1) no conditional logic, (2) test would only assert YAML structure, (3) purely eval configuration wiring.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval config exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Config contains provider field
  Verify: grep -q 'provider:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Config contains at least 2 test cases
  Verify: grep -c 'assert:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Config uses Haiku as grader
  Verify: grep -q 'haiku' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (create)
